description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the maven:3-jdk-11 Docker image. Define two stages: build-maven and build-debian-package. In the build-maven stage add a build-maven job that runs mvn clean install -B. In the build-debian-package stage add a build-debian-package job that runs apt update, apt-get -y upgrade, apt-get -y install apt-utils build-essential devscripts debhelper, mvn clean package -B, dpkg-buildpackage -us -uc, mkdir -p build/, mv ../*.deb build/, cd build, and mv twmindmapgenerator_0.0.0.1_all.deb twmindmapgenerator-amd64.deb, then publishes the resulting .deb files as an artifact named twmindmapgenerator with path build/*. No additional triggers, caches, or services are defined.
